note: Curated seed catalog for the SkillFinder. Extensible by hand or via a scraper job. Trust levels: official (Anthropic/OpenAI), verified (3000+ GitHub stars or a repeatedly vetted maintainer), community (actively maintained, <3000 stars), experimental (prototype, solo dev).

entries.name: brainstorming
entries.title: Brainstorming / Ideenfindung
entries.description: Interactive exploration of user intent before any creative work — asks targeted follow-up questions before code or a feature gets implemented.

entries.name: skill-creator
entries.title: Skill Creator
entries.description: Creates new skills and iteratively improves existing ones — Anthropic's official authoring toolkit.

entries.name: writing-plans
entries.title: Writing Plans
entries.description: Writes structured implementation plans for multi-step tasks — spec-driven development.

entries.name: executing-plans
entries.title: Executing Plans
entries.description: Executes written implementation plans in isolated sessions with review checkpoints.

entries.name: test-driven-development
entries.title: Test-Driven Development
entries.description: Red-green-refactor discipline — writes tests before implementation for every feature/bugfix.

entries.name: systematic-debugging
entries.title: Systematic Debugging
entries.description: Structured debugging methodology — for every bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before fixes are proposed.

entries.name: verification-before-completion
entries.title: Verification Before Completion
entries.description: Verifies work by running commands before claiming success — evidence before assertions.

entries.name: using-git-worktrees
entries.title: Using Git Worktrees
entries.description: Creates isolated git worktrees for feature work — prevents conflicts with work in progress.

entries.name: receiving-code-review
entries.title: Receiving Code Review
entries.description: Handles code-review feedback with technical rigor — verification instead of blind agreement.

entries.name: requesting-code-review
entries.title: Requesting Code Review
entries.description: Requests code review before merging — verifies completeness.

entries.name: finishing-a-development-branch
entries.title: Finishing a Development Branch
entries.description: Guides you structurally through finishing a feature branch: merge, PR, cleanup.

entries.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
entries.title: Dispatching Parallel Agents
entries.description: Parallelizes 2+ independent tasks across multiple agents — without shared state.

entries.name: subagent-driven-development
entries.title: Subagent-Driven Development
entries.description: Executes implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session — via subagents.

entries.name: writing-skills
entries.title: Writing Skills
entries.description: Meta-skill: creates or edits other skills and verifies functionality.

entries.name: using-superpowers
entries.title: Using Superpowers
entries.description: Establishes how other skills are found and used — a start-of-conversation skill.

entries.name: web-design-guidelines
entries.title: Web Design Guidelines
entries.description: Reviews UI code against web-interface guidelines — accessibility, UX, best practices.

entries.name: shadcn-ui
entries.title: shadcn/ui Integration
entries.description: Expert guidance for shadcn/ui component discovery, installation, and customization.

entries.name: frontend-design
entries.title: Frontend Design
entries.description: Creates distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces — beyond generic AI aesthetics.

entries.name: code-review
entries.title: Code Review
entries.description: Reviews a pull request for quality, conventions, and security.

entries.name: security-review
entries.title: Security Review
entries.description: Security review of the current branch — vulnerability scanning before merge.

entries.name: excalidraw-diagram
entries.title: Excalidraw Diagram
entries.description: Creates Excalidraw diagrams for workflows, architectures, concepts — visual arguments.

entries.name: commit-commands
entries.title: Commit / Push / PR
entries.description: Structured commit with conventional-commit style, push, and PR creation in one flow.

entries.name: feature-dev
entries.title: Feature Dev (Guided)
entries.description: Guided feature development with codebase understanding and an architecture focus.

entries.name: simplify
entries.title: Simplify Code
entries.description: Reviews changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency — fixes issues it finds.

entries.name: claude-api
entries.title: Claude API Helper
entries.description: Builds, debugs, and optimizes apps with the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — including prompt caching.

entries.name: pdf-extraction
entries.title: PDF Extraction
entries.description: Extracts text, tables, and metadata from PDF documents in a structured way.

entries.name: markdown-to-slides
entries.title: Markdown to Slides
entries.description: Converts Markdown documents into presentable slide decks (Reveal.js / Marp).

entries.name: browser-automation
entries.title: Browser Automation
entries.description: Controls a browser via Playwright — scraping, testing, task automation.

entries.name: email-triage
entries.title: Email Triage
entries.description: Prioritizes your inbox — categorizes, summarizes, and suggests replies.

entries.name: meeting-notes
entries.title: Meeting Notes
entries.description: Structures meeting notes — action items, decisions, follow-ups.

entries.name: code-archaeology
entries.title: Code Archaeology
entries.description: Explores old codebases — tracing patterns, architecture reconstruction, commit history.

entries.name: api-scaffold
entries.title: API Scaffold
entries.description: Generates API boilerplate — FastAPI, Express, Axum with best-practice defaults.

entries.name: docker-helper
entries.title: Docker Helper
entries.description: Creates Dockerfiles and docker-compose setups with multi-stage builds and best practices.

entries.name: sql-optimizer
entries.title: SQL Optimizer
entries.description: Analyzes SQL queries, suggests indexes, explains query plans.

entries.name: regex-explain
entries.title: Regex Explainer
entries.description: Explains complex regex patterns step by step and generates new ones.

entries.name: cron-reminder
entries.title: Cron Reminder
entries.description: Manages scheduled reminders via cron expressions — with natural-language input.

entries.name: voice-journal
entries.title: Voice Journal
entries.description: Voice-driven journal — STT plus summarization plus automatic tagging.

entries.name: gaming-log
entries.title: Gaming Log
entries.description: Logs gaming sessions, achievements, playtime — even via console bridges.
